title: MTR Japan_Style_PIDS 日式PIDS
description: A resource pack for MTR JCM to use.
body:
# Japan Style PIDS

A Japanese-style Passenger Information Display System add-on pack for MTR Mod, bringing authentic Japanese train station experience to your Minecraft railway.

## Introduction

Japan Style PIDS is a resource pack/add-on pack designed specifically for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod, providing Japanese railway-style platform information display screens to give your stations a more authentic Japanese atmosphere.

## Features

- Classic Japanese railway PIDS style
- Displays departure time
- Supports train type and destination station number display
- Requires JCMMOD

## Important Notes

- Destination numbers and train type colors need to be configured separately - please refer to our tutorial video
- [Tutorial Video](https://b23.tv/loSzm5f)

## Community

**[QQ Group: Qingdu Server Group](https://qm.qq.com/q/qSqDG03WvK)**

---

MTR Mod 的日本风格乘客信息显示系统附加包，为你的 Minecraft 铁路带来原汁原味的日本电车站体验。

## 简介

Japan Style PIDS 是一款专为 Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod 设计的资源包/附加包，提供日式铁道风格的站台信息显示屏，让你的车站风格更具日式风情。

## 特色功能

- 经典日式铁道 PIDS 样式
- 显示时间是发车时间
- 可以添加种次和终点站编号显示
- 需要使用JCMMOD

## 重要

- 终点编号和种次颜色需要单独配置可参考我们的视频
- [教程视频](https://b23.tv/loSzm5f)


## 社区交流
**[QQ群:晴都服务器群](https://qm.qq.com/q/qSqDG03WvK)**

---
